strengths: Exceeds minimum experience requirement with 19 years in software engineering across embedded, mobile, desktop, and cloud platforms
Currently working on AI infrastructure and agent frameworks (MCP code generators) at active company, showing recent engagement with AI technology
Proven full-stack builder across multiple domains with leadership experience mentoring others through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML (preferred qualification); lacks demonstrated deep expertise in machine learning, AI algorithms, or neural networks
No evidence of shipping or architecting AI-powered products with measurable business outcomes as required for the role
Background primarily as individual contributor; limited visible strategic advisory, enterprise customer partnership, or director-level leadership experience
response.justification: Bogdan has substantial software engineering tenure and is actively working in AI infrastructure, but the role requires deep AI/ML expertise and a track record of building AI-powered products with strategic impact. His experience centers on general software craftsmanship and platform engineering rather than AI innovation or machine learning. The MCP/agent framework work is infrastructure-focused rather than the strategic product differentiation and customer advisory work the principal role demands.
